title: reseda odorata var. neilgherrensis
intro: Reseda odorata var. neilgherrensis, also known as the Nilgiri reseda, is a variant of the common weed Reseda odorata, characterized by its distinctive and pungent fragrance. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Reseda odorata var. neilgherrensis include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of essential oils, extracts, or tinctures to promote relaxation and well-being.
